precedents.label: Marshall Plan (ERP)
precedents.mechanism: Grant aid via OEEC conditioned on European cooperation
precedents.relevance: Benchmark for post-conflict reconstruction grant scale

precedents.label: Kosovo Reconstruction (1999–2004)
precedents.mechanism: EU, World Bank, bilateral grants via UNMIK trust fund

precedents.label: International Compact with Iraq (2004)
precedents.mechanism: Multi-donor trust fund; IFI debt and bilateral grants

precedents.label: Ireland Strategic Investment Fund
precedents.mechanism: Sovereign wealth fund; first-loss co-investment, 1:3.5 leverage
precedents.relevance: Co-investment leverage model for Trust deployment phase

precedents.label: G7 ERA Extraordinary Revenue Acceleration Loan
precedents.mechanism: Loan collateralised against frozen Russian sovereign asset windfall interest
precedents.relevance: Direct legal precedent for ERA-backed Trust capitalisation
